CVE-2018-20990.title: An issue was discovered in the tar crate before 0.4.16 for Rust.  ...
CVE-2018-20990.summary: An issue was discovered in the tar crate before 0.4.16 for Rust. Arbitrary file overwrite can occur via a symlink or hardlink in a TAR archive.

CVE-2021-38511.title: An issue was discovered in the tar crate before 0.4.36 for Rust.  ...
CVE-2021-38511.summary: An issue was discovered in the tar crate before 0.4.36 for Rust. When symlinks are present in a TAR archive, extraction can create arbitrary directories via .. traversal.
